meaning: adj.五的,五倍的,五部分组成的n.五倍vt.使成五倍
examples: They want to quintuple the total sales of their shop.
Only then can the data be processed-and an averaged-out quintuple generated.
You can make special requests, like 'dressing on the side' or 'quintuple bacon.
At 3.5 percent growth, the standard of living would more than quintuple in that time.
Undeterred, Eyrie's Lett is pressing forward, hoping to quintuple his meunier acreage over the next decade.
